name: Brunch Quiche
recipeIngredient: 7 oz or ½ lb package elbow macaroni
6 slices to 8 pieces cooked bacon, chopped
1 small green bell pepper, finely chopped
6 to 8 drops bottled hot pepper sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the elbow macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a medium skillet, cook the bacon until crisp; drain.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, bacon, American cheese, Monterey Jack cheese, bread cubes, finely chopped onion, and green bell pepper.
4. In a medium bowl, beat together the egg yolks, milk, salt, and hot pepper sauce.
5. Add the egg yolk mixture to the macaroni mixture; mix well.
6. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff. Fold into the macaroni mixture.
7. Transfer the batter to a buttered 12-inch quiche dish or a 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
8. Place a shallow baking dish with 1-2 inches of water on the lowest rack of an oven preheated to 325°F (165°C).
9. Place the quiche in the center rack.
10. Bake until set and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.
11. Let stand for 5 minutes before cutting.
12. Garnish as desired. Serve with salsa. Refrigerate leftovers.
